description: sandals from fila are made with fine fabrics crafted in Italy's materials capital, Biella. These Tremor floaters from fila are an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. The fabric upper and aggressive lugs on the sole showcase the Italian brand's versatile power in innovation. These sandals are perfect for braving the Indian monsoon and for general rough use. Wear these with your off-duty essentials. Upper Fabric upper in an attractive design with forefoot, collar and ankle straps, complete with velcro fasteners for a snug Fit Forefoot and ankle straps attached with a diagonal interconnecting strap via triangular loop for enhanced comfort Cushioned lining for greater comfort on the ankle strap and collar Appliquéd logo on the straps Midsole Cushioned footbed with branding pattern for soft massage feel and all day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with multi-directional pattern for durability Flex grooves for natural movement of the feet Sandal care Rub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
